docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF STEPHEN N. ROBERTS IN OPPOSITION TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA PUBLIC EMPLOYEES RETIREMENT SYSTEM

PROOF OF SERVICE OF REPLY MEMORANDUM IN SUPPORT OF PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE UNDER TH CALIFORNIA PUBLIC RECORDS ACT (GOVERNMENT CODE SECTIONS 6258 AND 6259); DECLARATION OF KARL OLSON; EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS AND (PROPOSED) ORDER GRANTING PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY PETITIONER FIRST AMENDMENT COALITION

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER FIRST AMENDMENT COALITION'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE UNDER THE PUBLIC RECORDS ACT. THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. COUNSEL REPRESENTED THAT THE PARTIES HAD AGREED TO A MODIFIED VERSION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AS PRESENTED IN A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. UPON REVIEW, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND ADOPTED COUNSELS' PROPOSED ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearipng On Petition For Writ Of Mandate Under The Public Records Act
Off Calendar Sep-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER FIRST AMENDMENT COALITION'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE UNDER THE PUBLIC RECORDS ACT. Appearances: Karl Olson of Levy Ram & Olson LLP (433.4949) for petitioner and moving party. No other appearances. The matter was not argued. Counsel represented that the parties had agreed to a modified version of the tentative ruling as presented in a proposed form of order. Upon review, the court vacated its tentative ruling and adopted counsels' proposed order. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice Of Hearipng On Petition For Writ Of Mandate Under The Public Records Act
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Continued To Sep-14-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER FIRST AMENDMENT COALITION'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE UNDER THE PUBLIC RECORDS ACT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 14, 2010 PER EX PARTE ORDER FILED AUGUST 27, 2010. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
